name: Joseph Cyriac
notes: Lead gen for construction staffing. Revised to $900/mo managed, reduced volume, no minimum contract.

timeline.event: Discovery call — lead gen for construction staffing, bootstrapping, price-sensitive
Follow-up email sent + requirement analysis completed
Sales script, pitch deck, and proposal generated — $3,500 one-time / $1,500/mo managed
Joseph came back — negotiated down to $900/mo managed, reduced volume (100 LinkedIn/week, 50 DMs/week, 200 cold emails/week), no minimum contract
Revised proposal sent at $900/mo with reduced scope, month-to-month with advance payment
Joseph reviewed revised proposal — raised 4 questions: system ownership, payment split, tool cost increase, multi-touch vs 7-touch sequence
Prakarsh addressed all 4 questions. Agreed to split Month 1 ($450+$450). Clarified ownership stays with Small Group on managed plan. Tool costs corrected to $100-200/mo.
Follow-up sent — asked if he's gone through the proposal
Joseph replied: weighing agency costs vs hiring an individual person. Prakarsh pushed urgency — need to move fast and build systems.

current_status: Joseph is weighing agency cost ($900/mo) vs. hiring someone directly. All proposal questions answered. Split payment agreed for Month 1. He's not saying no — he's justifying the spend. Needs a nudge or a compelling reason to commit over DIY/hiring.
